name: Southern-Style Iced Tea
recipeInstructions:
1. Place water in a large saucepan and bring to a boil.
2. Add teabags, cinnamon stick, and lemon slices to the boiling water.
3. Reduce heat to low and cover loosely.
4. Simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and stir in sugar until fully dissolved.
6. Discard teabags, cinnamon stick, and lemon slices.
7. Pour tea into a large jug and refrigerate until well chilled.
